title: AI Engineer (Agent Systems)
description:
CognitiveLabs is seeking an AI Engineer specializing in LangGraph and workflow orchestration to join our Core Intelligence team.

Key Responsibilities:
- Build and deploy multi-agent routing engines and structured agent memory modules.
- Optimize semantic retrieval using Qdrant vector database.
- Collaborate with developers to build web interfaces in Streamlit for client prototypes.

Required Skills:
- Python, FastAPI, and Pydantic validation
- Hands-on experience with LangGraph or similar graph-based agent frameworks
- Custom context memory architectures and persistent databases (SQLite/PostgreSQL)
- Semantic search and vector embeddings optimization (specifically Qdrant or Pgvector)

Nice-to-have:
- Docker containerization and cloud deployments (AWS/GCP)
- Experience with LLM evaluation packages like Ragas or TruLens

title: Applied AI Engineer
description:
We are looking for an Applied AI Engineer to join our rapid-prototyping and engineering group. You will convert research models into reliable enterprise products.

Responsibilities:
- Design advanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) structures using hybrid search and reranking.
- Build robust APIs to expose model capabilities safely using FastAPI and Pydantic.
- Set up structured workflows to orchestrate LLM calls and fallback logic.

Requirements:
- 2+ years of software engineering experience with Python and relational databases (SQL)
- Experience with LangChain, LangGraph, and vector databases
- Familiarity with unit testing and CI/CD pipelines
- Ability to dedicate and self-manage development tasks under tight deadlines

title: Machine Learning Engineer (RAG Systems)
description:
QueryTech is searching for a Machine Learning Engineer specializing in RAG architectures to scale our document search tools.

Key Responsibilities:
- Build scalable document parser pipelines and indexers.
- Fine-tune ML models and optimize embeddings models for specific domain searches.
- Perform vector database administration, database indexing, and query speedups.

Requirements:
- 3+ years experience with Python, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-Learn, and Git workflows
- Hands-on deployment of production-grade Qdrant, Pinecone, or Milvus databases
- Good understanding of dockerized microservices and automated integration tests
- Knowledge of LLM guardrails, Prompt engineering, and prompt routing logic

title: Data Scientist
description:
Pulse Analytics is seeking a Data Scientist to help turn complex dataset findings into actionable generative AI tools.

Key Responsibilities:
- Run exploratory data analysis (EDA) and train traditional ML models (Scikit-Learn, XGBoost).
- Write clean data pipelines using SQL, Pandas, and NumPy.
- Build internal interactive web applications using Streamlit to demo statistical models.

Qualifications:
- Strong analytical skills with Python and SQL
- Basic familiarity with LLMs, prompt template engineering, and OpenAI APIs
- Git version control and collaborative coding practices
